lesson: When a plugin DLL statically links the host engine, exe and DLL get separate copies of every global/singleton/type-id; keep shared state exe-side only.
Destroy engine-owned ECS registries and pools before FreeLibrary on a module DLL, not after — dangling vtables from unloaded code crash or hang at exit.

Don't assume all cross-DLL reflection breaks together: compiler-intrinsic type hashing (e.g. __FUNCSIG__) can stay stable across images even when service-locator addresses don't; verify each mechanism separately.

Embedded fallback shader source must mirror the engine-side constant-buffer struct field-for-field; one missing member silently shifts later fields into zeroed memory with no error, just black output.
Mouse-capture delta math must use one consistent coordinate space (client vs screen); mixing them produces a huge fake delta that instantly saturates camera pitch/yaw clamps.
Frame-count-based test scheduling is unreliable under variable frame rate (vsync, occlusion); give smoke-test harnesses a wall-clock scheduling mode instead.

A 'no module specified' fallback that auto-loads every matching plugin DLL in the output directory can silently load mutually-incompatible plugins together; force single-mode by pointing it at a deliberately invalid-but-existing path.
When CI gates third-party version pins via a manifest/lock file, update that lock file in the same change as the dependency bump or automated update PRs fail the gate.
